name: Deterra Royalties Limited
analysis: DRR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 5% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$4.5100, stop A$4.2125, target A$5.4027 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
